headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks to Research Further and 1 We Find Risky
summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.

headline: Is Robinhood (HOOD) Using Its New Buyback to Redefine Capital Allocation Priorities?
summary: Earlier this week, Robinhood Markets’ board authorized a new US$1.50 billion Class A share repurchase program, expected to span roughly three years and supported by a US$3.25 billion revolving credit facility. This sizable, open-ended buyback replaces prior authorizations and signals management’s confidence in Robinhood’s balance sheet strength and evolving multi-product business model despite recent share price pressure. We’ll now examine how this new US$1.50 billion repurchase plan...

headline: Robinhood Slides 6%: 3 Reasons the Market Is Not Impressed by the Buyback
summary: Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ:HOOD) stock is falling 6% in early trading Friday, pulling back from an opening price of $70.35 to around $66. The move adds to a bruising stretch for HOOD shares, which are now down 41% year to date. The catalyst drawing attention is Robinhood’s newly announced $1.5 billion share repurchase program. headline: Genius Sports (GENI) Faces Lawsuit While Analyst Reaffirms Buy Rating
summary: Genius Sports Limited (NYSE:GENI) is one of the popular penny stocks on Robinhood to buy.
